purpose: Define non-breaking optional business/carrier scope metadata candidates backed by the smart_core platform scope mixin.
kernel: platform -> company -> business -> carrier -> fact -> projection
policy: Optional scope metadata may describe future platform scope through sc.business.scope.mixin, but existing project behavior remains authoritative until probes prove the new scope is safe.

model_scope_metadata.current_required_binding: project_id is required and remains the construction workflow carrier.
model_scope_metadata.pressure_reason: Tender is a company-managed income opportunity that may exist before a construction project should be created.

proposed_optional_fields.name: business_scope_key
proposed_optional_fields.purpose: Stable optional key for grouping tender, later contract, and possible future carrier under one company-managed business matter.

proposed_optional_fields.name: business_direction
proposed_optional_fields.purpose: Cross-industry direction metadata; tender defaults to income without making income a construction-only platform concept.

proposed_optional_fields.name: carrier_type
proposed_optional_fields.purpose: Future carrier discriminator such as project, case, order, shipment, or contract.

proposed_optional_fields.name: carrier_model
proposed_optional_fields.purpose: Technical model name of the carrier when the carrier is known.

proposed_optional_fields.name: carrier_res_id
proposed_optional_fields.purpose: Technical record id of the carrier when the carrier is known.

model_scope_metadata.compatibility_rule: project_id, operation_strategy, currency_id, owner defaults, and won-to-contract behavior must keep working when optional scope fields are empty.
model_scope_metadata.migration_policy: Do not require backfill. Existing tenders may derive optional carrier metadata from project_id in a non-authoritative migration only after probes exist.
forbidden_promotion: Do not replace project_id with generic carrier metadata.
Do not introduce sc.business as source-of-truth from this metadata alone.
